label: Growth Marketing Lead
summary: Growth marketer who turns paid + lifecycle channels into predictable pipeline. 8 years scaling B2B SaaS acquisition.

bulletPool.text: Grew inbound signups 42% YoY by rebuilding the paid search + landing page funnel.
Cut blended CAC 28% by shifting spend to high-intent channels using attribution modelling.
Launched a lifecycle email program that lifted trial-to-paid conversion 15%.
Built a self-serve GA4 + SQL reporting layer adopted by the whole marketing team.
First marketing hire; established acquisition channels from zero to $2M ARR contribution.
Ran 60+ landing-page A/B tests, lifting conversion rate from 1.8% to 3.1%.
